steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A: \(15x+10\) — the constant term 10 was not multiplied by 15. Incorrect.
  • B: \(15x+150\) — matches the distributed result exactly. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • C: \(15x+25\) — 25 ≠ 150. Incorrect.
  • D: \(15x+5\) — 5 ≠ 150. Incorrect.
